{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS
WITH haus_counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM decision_table
  WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'
  GROUP BY HAUS
),
eabl_2023_2024 AS (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY EQUNR
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr("Record created on",1,4)) = 2
)
SELECT
  dt.HAUS,
  dt.ANLAGE,
  dt.ME_MA_ID,
  dt.EQUNR,
  dt.HOUSE_NUM1,
  CASE
    WHEN e23.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN 'MANDATORY_READING'
    WHEN dt.HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN dt.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN dt.HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN dt.CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR dt.CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU'
    WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
  END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE,
  COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
  COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
  COALESCE(sm.STREET, nm.STREET) AS STREET,
  COALESCE(sm.STREETNO, nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
  COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(sm.CITY1, nm.CITY1) AS CITY1,
  COALESCE(sm.CITY2, nm.CITY2) AS CITY2,
  COALESCE(sm.EMAIL, nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL
FROM decision_table dt
LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON dt.HAUS = hc.HAUS
LEFT JOIN eablg eb ON dt.ANLAGE = eb.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON dt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON dt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN eabl_2023_2024 e23 ON dt.EQUNR = e23.EQUNR
WHERE dt.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';

No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(sm.STREET, nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(sm.STREETNO, nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(sm.CITY1, nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(sm.CITY2, nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(sm.EMAIL, nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM decision_table dt LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON dt.HAUS = hc.HAUS LEFT JOIN eablg eb ON dt.ANLAGE = eb.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON dt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON dt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN eabl_2023_2024 e23 ON dt.EQUNR = e23.EQUNR WHERE dt.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

Process J09D completed.
